expect: If PHIL-28 is structurally binding, session-level benefit_ratio should correlate positively with human signal frequency at r>=0.3 over at least 30 observations; otherwise the claimed upper bound remains empirically unsupported.
actual: PHIL-28 binding test: r=-0.206 (external), -0.272 (human). Both negative. NOT detected.
diff: Expected r>=0.3, got negative. PHIL-28 remains empirically unsupported.
